Tripod X Display Hardware Features for Professional Banner Mounting

Our Tripod X Display Hardware provides professional-grade banner mounting solutions for trade shows, events, and business displays. This portable banner stand hardware features a collapsible tripod base that folds out for fast and easy setup, making it ideal for frequent use at various locations.

Key Features:

  • Tripod base folds out for fast and easy setup
  • Strong, flexible fiberglass arms keep banners taut and professional-looking
  • Drawstring storage pouch included for convenient transport
  • Lightweight at 2.4 lbs for easy portability
  • Compatible with 24" x 60" custom banners

Product Specifications:

  • Product Size: 26.75" W x 65.75" H x 30" D
  • Product Weight: 2.4 lbs
  • Material: Durable metal frame with fiberglass arms
  • Banner sold separately

Tripod X Display Hardware Assembly & Setup Options

The Tripod X Display Hardware comes ready to use with professional setup features:

Standard Assembly Features:

  • Pre-assembled tripod base - no tools required
  • Quick-setup fiberglass arms with secure banner attachment points
  • Foldable design for compact storage and transport
  • Drawstring carrying pouch included

Setup Instructions:

  • Unfold tripod legs to desired width
  • Extend fiberglass arms to full length
  • Attach banner to arm endpoints using grommets or pole pockets
  • Adjust leg positioning for optimal stability

The hardware is designed for quick setup and breakdown, making it ideal for trade shows, retail displays, and event signage.

Banner Specifications for Tripod X Display Hardware Mounting

The Tripod X Display Hardware is designed to work with 24" x 60" banners. Here are the requirements for compatible banner designs:

Banner Size Requirements:

  • Standard size: 24" width x 60" height
  • Banner orientation: Vertical display format
  • Recommended materials: Vinyl or fabric banners
  • Weight considerations: Lightweight to medium-weight materials work best

Banner Finishing Options:

  • Grommets: Recommended for secure attachment to fiberglass arms
  • Pole pockets: Top and bottom pole pockets for clean display
  • Reinforced edges: Helps prevent tearing during setup and use
  • Wind-resistant materials: Important for outdoor applications

Design Considerations:

  • Keep important text and graphics within the center 80% of banner area
  • Use high-contrast colors for maximum visibility
  • Consider viewing distance when selecting font sizes
  • Account for slight banner movement in outdoor conditions

Banner Ordering:

Banners are sold separately from the hardware. Browse our selection of 24" x 60" custom banners to complete your display setup.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Tripod X Display Hardware

What banner sizes work with the Tripod X Display Hardware?

The Tripod X Display Hardware is specifically designed for 24" x 60" banners. This size provides optimal display proportions and ensures proper tension across the fiberglass arms.

Are banners included with the hardware purchase?

No, banners are sold separately from the hardware. This allows you to order multiple banners for the same hardware unit or replace banners as needed for different events or promotions.

How much does the Tripod X Display Hardware weigh?

The complete hardware unit weighs only 2.4 lbs, making it extremely portable for trade shows, events, and frequent transport between locations.

Can the hardware be used outdoors?

Yes, the Tripod X Display Hardware can be used outdoors. However, we recommend securing the base with sandbags or weights in windy conditions to prevent tipping.

What type of banner attachment works best?

Both grommets and pole pockets work well with the Tripod X Display Hardware. Grommets provide secure point attachment, while pole pockets create a cleaner finished appearance.

How long does the hardware last with regular use?

With proper care, the Tripod X Display Hardware is built for years of regular use. The durable metal construction and flexible fiberglass arms are designed to withstand frequent setup and breakdown.

Is assembly required?

The hardware ships pre-assembled and ready to use. Simply unfold the tripod legs, extend the fiberglass arms, and attach your banner - no tools required.

What's included with my hardware order?

Each order includes the complete Tripod X Display Hardware unit and a drawstring carrying pouch for storage and transport.
